  "findings": [
    "Proposed recovery plan bypasses a mandatory inspection hold (K - Insulation inspection) by starting drywall hanging (L) before the inspection is complete."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the proposed recovery plan.",
    "Maintain the insulation inspection (K) as a hard constraint before hanging drywall (L).",
    "Identify alternative recovery methods such as crashing/overlapping non-constrained activities (e.g., parallel work on F, G, H, or adding resources to framing/drywall)."
  ],
  "rationale": "The foreman's recovery plan proposes starting drywall hanging (L) before the insulation inspection (K) is complete. The schedule legend explicitly states that red bars represent inspection holds that cannot be bypassed. Bypassing the insulation inspection violates building codes and standard commercial construction practices, as insulation must be inspected and approved before it is covered by drywall.",
  "references": [
    "International Building Code (IBC) Section 110.3.6 - Lath, gypsum board and gypsum panel product inspection",
    "International Building Code (IBC) Section 110.3.8 - Energy efficiency inspections (Insulation)"
  ]
}
